purpose: Service catalog and knowledge dependency matrix for a Kubernetes-based homelab platform.

domains.name: core-infrastructure
domains.description: Foundational services required for platform stability, bootstrapping, and baseline operations.

capabilities.name: time-synchronization
capabilities.description: Maintains accurate system time across infrastructure.

services.name: ntp
services.description: Provides time synchronization for VMs, Kubernetes nodes, and infrastructure services.

troubleshooting: Certificate validation failures caused by incorrect time
Authentication failures caused by time drift

capabilities.name: bootstrap-automation
capabilities.description: Provides scripts and automation for initializing infrastructure.

services.name: utility-scripts
services.description: Reusable scripts for provisioning, configuration, and recovery tasks.

domains.name: network
domains.description: Provides ingress, DNS, routing, certificates, and secure remote access.

capabilities.name: reverse-proxy
capabilities.description: Routes HTTP/S traffic to internal services.

services.name: caddy
services.description: Reverse proxy and TLS termination layer for internal and external services.

capabilities.name: dns-filtering
capabilities.description: Provides local DNS resolution and filtering.

services.name: adguard-home
services.description: DNS resolver, ad blocker, and local DNS manager.

capabilities.name: remote-access
capabilities.description: Provides secure access to the lab from remote devices.

services.name: tailscale
services.description: WireGuard-based mesh VPN for remote access and private networking.

domains.name: storage
domains.description: Provides persistent storage, object storage, model storage, and backup targets.

capabilities.name: persistent-volumes
capabilities.description: Provides durable storage for Kubernetes workloads.

services.name: nfs
services.description: Network file storage exported to Kubernetes and other systems.

capabilities.name: object-storage
capabilities.description: Provides S3-compatible storage for backups, artifacts, and application data.

services.name: minio
services.description: Self-hosted S3-compatible object storage.

domains.name: identity
domains.description: Provides authentication, authorization, SSO, and credential management.

capabilities.name: authentication
capabilities.description: Centralizes user and application authentication.

services.name: authentik
services.description: Identity provider for SSO, federation, and application authentication.

services.name: vaultwarden
services.description: Self-hosted password manager compatible with Bitwarden clients.

domains.name: data
domains.description: Provides databases, caching, search, and structured data services.

capabilities.name: relational-database
capabilities.description: Provides structured data storage.

services.name: postgresql
services.description: Primary relational database for applications and platform services.

services.name: pgvector
services.description: PostgreSQL extension for vector search and AI embedding storage.

capabilities.name: cache
capabilities.description: Provides high-speed temporary data storage.

services.name: redis
services.description: In-memory cache, session store, queue backend, and pub/sub system.

capabilities.name: search
capabilities.description: Provides indexing and full-text search.

services.name: elasticsearch
services.description: Distributed search and indexing engine.

domains.name: ai
domains.description: Provides local AI inference, model routing, AI interfaces, vector storage, and LLM observability.

capabilities.name: model-inference
capabilities.description: Runs local AI models.

services.name: ollama
services.description: Local model runtime for serving LLMs.

capabilities.name: model-gateway
capabilities.description: Routes model requests across providers and local models.

services.name: litellm
services.description: OpenAI-compatible gateway for routing, tracking, and managing AI model access.

capabilities.name: chat-interface
capabilities.description: Provides a user interface for AI model interaction.

services.name: open-webui
services.description: Web interface for interacting with local and remote AI models.

capabilities.name: llm-observability
capabilities.description: Tracks AI usage, latency, prompts, and responses.

services.name: langfuse
services.description: Observability platform for LLM applications.

domains.name: automation
domains.description: Provides workflow automation, source control, deployment tooling, and development environments.

capabilities.name: workflow-automation
capabilities.description: Automates operational and business workflows.

services.name: n8n
services.description: Workflow automation platform for API integrations and scheduled jobs.

capabilities.name: source-control
capabilities.description: Provides Git repository hosting.

services.name: forgejo
services.description: Self-hosted Git service for repositories, issues, and pull requests.

domains.name: observability
domains.description: Provides metrics, dashboards, monitoring, and operational visibility.

capabilities.name: metrics
capabilities.description: Collects and stores infrastructure and application metrics.

services.name: prometheus
services.description: Time-series metrics database and monitoring system.

services.name: grafana
services.description: Dashboard and visualization platform for metrics, logs, and traces.

domains.name: gitops
domains.description: Provides declarative deployment and desired-state reconciliation from Git.

capabilities.name: deployment-management
capabilities.description: Manages Kubernetes deployments from Git repositories.

services.name: argocd
services.description: GitOps controller for Kubernetes application deployment.

domains.name: security
domains.description: Provides secrets management, vulnerability scanning, runtime detection, and policy enforcement.

capabilities.name: secrets-management
capabilities.description: Manages application and infrastructure secrets.

services.name: vault
services.description: Centralized secrets management and encryption service.

services.name: external-secrets-operator
services.description: Synchronizes external secrets into Kubernetes Secrets.

capabilities.name: vulnerability-scanning
capabilities.description: Scans workloads and images for known vulnerabilities.

services.name: trivy
services.description: Security scanner for containers, filesystems, IaC, and Kubernetes manifests.

domains.name: logging
domains.description: Provides centralized log collection, querying, and distributed tracing.

capabilities.name: log-aggregation
capabilities.description: Collects logs from applications and infrastructure.

services.name: loki
services.description: Log aggregation system optimized for Kubernetes and Grafana.

services.name: tempo
services.description: Distributed tracing backend for request tracing.

domains.name: platform-engineering
domains.description: Provides developer self-service, service catalog, software templates, and platform documentation.

capabilities.name: developer-portal
capabilities.description: Central interface for developers and platform users.

services.name: backstage
services.description: Internal developer portal for service catalog, templates, documentation, and ownership.

domains.name: registry
domains.description: Stores and secures container images and software artifacts.

capabilities.name: container-registry
capabilities.description: Hosts internal container images.

services.name: harbor
services.description: Private container registry with image scanning and access control.

domains.name: backup-recovery
domains.description: Provides backup, restore, and disaster recovery workflows.

capabilities.name: kubernetes-backups
capabilities.description: Protects Kubernetes workloads and cluster resources.

services.name: velero
services.description: Backup and restore tool for Kubernetes clusters and persistent volumes.

domains.name: messaging
domains.description: Provides asynchronous messaging and event-driven communication.

capabilities.name: message-queue
capabilities.description: Provides reliable asynchronous message delivery.

services.name: rabbitmq
services.description: Message broker for queues, routing, and background processing.

services.name: nats
services.description: Lightweight messaging and event streaming platform.

domains.name: applications
domains.description: Hosts user-facing applications, internal portals, documentation, and collaboration services.

capabilities.name: collaboration
capabilities.description: Provides team communication.

services.name: mattermost
services.description: Self-hosted team chat and collaboration platform.

capabilities.name: documentation
capabilities.description: Provides knowledge management and documentation.

services.name: outline
services.description: Internal documentation and knowledge base platform.
